title: Equilibrium Guardian Protocol
requirements: Continuous monitoring of Merkle-hashes across the sovereign galaxy.
Proactive drift detection for core metadata (.ai/config, .ai/agents).
Autonomous remediation: Trigger sync_protocol_v2 on detected drift.
Compliance: Alert global Omega Gate on persistence of Law 151 violations.

logic.heartbeat: Periodic polling of regional shard hashes.
logic.drift_analysis: Identify specific file-level delta in out-of-sync shards.
logic.self_healing: Execute atomic patch application to restore equilibrium.

compliance.auditing: Log all drift events and remediation hashes in the Factory-Ledger.
compliance.sovereignty: Prioritize Egypt-soil state during reconciliation conflicts.
